name: portfolio-site
description: Sreehari Pradeep Kumar's portfolio — an audience gate that routes developers to a VS Code–style Next.js build (/dev) and everyone else to the Agent Swarm Vite build (/portfolio).

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix web install && npm --prefix portfolio-v2 install && npm --prefix worker install
scripts.build: npm run build:portfolio && npm run build:dev && npm run assemble
